headline: The live obs is information-rich and READY for Model A's stack audit -- every public fact audited is observable. The one actionable RUNTIME gap is turn-context: present in EVERY obs (current.turnActionCount/supporterPlayed/energyAttached/retreated/turn/firstPlayer) but extracted by neither the adapter nor the model. This is an EXTRACTION gap (cheap), not an availability gap, and it maps onto the selector's develop-vs-attack failure.

blind_spots_ranked.name: turn_context_features
blind_spots_ranked.detail: current.turnActionCount/supporterPlayed/energyAttached/retreated/turn/firstPlayer are present in EVERY obs but reach neither the adapter nor the model's 11 state features. Directly drives the develop-vs-attack timing the selector got wrong (it cannot see how much of the turn is spent).
blind_spots_ranked.fix: extract into adapter state_features + tactical (DIRECT fields, cheap)

blind_spots_ranked.name: status_conditions_and_summoning_sickness
blind_spots_ranked.detail: player.asleep/paralyzed/confused/burned/poisoned + entity.appearThisTurn are present, not extracted. Affect attack/retreat legality + tempo.

blind_spots_ranked.name: discard_zone_belief
blind_spots_ranked.detail: both players' discards are fully visible; not used for prize/deck-copy belief or known-remaining counts.

blind_spots_ranked.name: conditional_damage_and_ignore_prevention_taxonomy
blind_spots_ranked.detail: Nebula ignore-wk/rs + Alakazam scaling + any prevention are HARDCODED in deck_policy, not clean card_effect features; opaque to the model via card_id/attack_id.
blind_spots_ranked.fix: extend card_effects.json with ignore/prevent/conditional tags (Model A's stack)

blind_spots_ranked.name: tools_stadium
blind_spots_ranked.detail: entity.tools + current.stadium present, not extracted; low relevance for this deck (no stadium, Hero's Cape tool matters for KO threshold).

blind_spots_ranked.name: full_same_turn_action_history
blind_spots_ranked.detail: obs.logs is a short recent list; full prev-action-families this turn needs a local state tracker.

good_news: no history tracker needed for the key turn-context signals; all are direct current.* fields.
constraints_honored: audit only; no gameplay, no heuristics/model/submission change, Model A untouched.
